completion_promises.criterion_text: Tests mock create_deep_agent at the import site (agents.player.create_deep_agent)
completion_promises.evidence: TestPatchAtImportSite class patches agents.player.create_deep_agent (not deepagents.create_deep_agent). test_create_deep_agent_patched_at_import_site verifies mock_cda.assert_called_once(). test_returns_result_of_create_deep_agent confirms return value identity.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tests verify call_args keyword arguments for tools, backend, system_prompt, memory
completion_promises.evidence: TestCallArgsKeywordArguments class uses _, kwargs = mock_cda.call_args pattern to verify all 5 kwargs: system_prompt, memory, tools (membership), backend (identity), and model (string type). Each is a separate test method for precise failure attribution.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tests verify FilesystemBackend is in the backend kwarg
completion_promises.evidence: TestFilesystemBackendWiring class uses the two-part assertion pattern: (1) mock_backend_cls.assert_called_once_with(root_dir='.') verifies constructor args, (2) kwargs['backend'] is fake_backend verifies the instance is forwarded to create_deep_agent.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tests verify tools list contains exactly 2 tools
completion_promises.evidence: TestToolsListSize class verifies len(kwargs['tools']) == 2 and both tool_a and tool_b are present via membership assertions (in kwargs['tools']).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Module-level import assertion: hasattr(player_module, 'FilesystemBackend') or equivalent
completion_promises.evidence: TestModuleLevelImports class uses sys.modules.pop('agents.player', None) for fresh import, then hasattr(player_module, 'FilesystemBackend') and hasattr(player_module, 'create_deep_agent') assertions with descriptive error messages.
All tests written to tests/test_player_factory.py as required.
